question.label: Communication feedback
question.name: That communication feedback — what part of it are you still processing?
question.description: Drills into the specific feedback thread she just named to locate the real blocker.

answer: I want more room to lead cross-functional discussions earlier.

assessment.note: She names a specific missing condition — earlier room to lead cross-functional discussions — which shows some clarity about the issue and strong engagement frustration; growth also surfaced but is off-signature. [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'lead cross-functional discussions earlier' not followed because drill cap requires advancing the arc.

new_queue.label: Steadier finish
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?

new_queue.label: Support shape
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually change your week?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 6)

history.answer_excerpt: Feedback on communication landed, and I am still processing it.
The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
I am less overloaded now, but my calendar is still fragmented.
A lot of energy went into firefighting and context switching.
I can ship quickly, but I do not always feel the impact is visible.
